name: Value Stream Map
description: Map the sequence of work, queues, handoffs, and waste across a delivery flow
systemPromptHint: Map the actual current-state flow, not the ideal flow — every real step belongs. Distinguish process time from wait time — queues and delays typically dominate total lead time. There are usually one or two true bottlenecks; if everything appears constrained, the analysis lacks depth. Optimize for flow, not local efficiency — improving non-constraints does not increase system throughput.

nodeTags.name: Process
nodeTags.description: A step that transforms work or moves it forward

nodeTags.name: Queue
nodeTags.description: Work waiting between active processing steps

nodeTags.name: Inspection
nodeTags.description: A review, approval, or quality check point

nodeTags.name: Handoff
nodeTags.description: A transfer of work between people, teams, or systems

nodeTags.name: Customer Value
nodeTags.description: A step that directly contributes customer-visible value

nodeTags.name: Waste
nodeTags.description: Delay, rework, excess handling, or other non-value-adding work

nodeTags.name: Constraint
nodeTags.description: A limiting step that caps overall throughput

derivedIndicators.name: Start
derivedIndicators.description: No upstream step feeds this part of the stream

derivedIndicators.name: Intermediate Step
derivedIndicators.description: Work both arrives here and continues onward

derivedIndicators.name: End
derivedIndicators.description: No downstream step follows from here
